title: Writing
content:
# Writing

In Kecare, articles have fixed storage locations and format specifications. This document will teach you how to create and write articles.

---

## Article Storage Location

In Kecare, articles are uniformly stored in the following directory:

| Item | Description |
|------|------|
| Directory Location | `Theme Directory/.kecare/articles/` |
| File Type | Currently only supports `*.md` (Markdown files) |
| Naming Suggestion | Use stable, readable English filenames |

### Naming Conventions

It is recommended to use the following naming conventions:

```txt
getting-started.md     # 推荐：小写字母 + 连字符
my-first-post.md       # 推荐：清晰易懂
hello-kecare.md        # 推荐：描述性命名
```

> ⚠️ **Note**: Avoid frequently changing file names. Article IDs are typically generated from file name hashes, and changes to file names may cause old links to become invalid.

---

## Create Article

### Step 1: Create a New File

Create a new Markdown file in the `.kecare/articles/` directory:

```bash
# 示例：创建一篇新文章
touch .kecare/articles/hello-kecare.md
```

### Step 2: Write Content

Open the file and start writing your article content.

---

## Article Structure

A complete article typically consists of two parts: **Front Matter** and **Main Content**.

### Complete Example

```markdown
---
title: Hello Kecare
date: 2026-01-22 12:00:00
tags:
  - kecare
  - blog
desc: 这是我的第一篇 Kecare 文章
author: Pamper
menu: test
translate: ['zh-CN', 'en-US', 'ja-JP']
---

# Hello Kecare

这是一段正文内容。

## 第一章

- 支持 Markdown 标题
- 支持列表
- 支持代码块

\`\`\`ts
console.log("Hello, Kecare!");
\`\`\`

## 第二章

更多内容...
```

## Running the Generator

After writing the article, you need to run the generator to see the updates in the browser.

Start your writing journey! ✍️
